title: hedyotis horneriana
intro: Hedyotis horneriana, also known as Chinese harebell or Lian Qiao, is a plant species within the Hedyotis genus, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve fever, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Hedyotis horneriana is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing coughs and colds, improving immune function, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent. It is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is also incorporated into traditional Chinese medicine formulas for its purported health benefits.
